lessons.title: Fill Factor
objectives: Define and calculate fill factor for encircling and bobbin coil tests
Explain how fill factor affects sensitivity and signal amplitude
Specify acceptable fill factor ranges for tubular product testing

lessons.title: Liftoff
objectives: Describe liftoff effects on amplitude and phase for surface probes
Apply liftoff compensation and phase-rotation techniques
Use liftoff intentionally for coating thickness measurement

lessons.title: Field Strength: Permeability Changes and Saturation
objectives: Explain how permeability variations create noise in ferromagnetic testing
Describe magnetic saturation and its use in suppressing permeability noise
Select field strength to manage permeability effects

lessons.title: AC Field Strength Effects on Eddy Current Testing
objectives: Analyze the effect of AC field strength on eddy current response
Recognize nonlinear effects from excessive drive in magnetic materials
Set drive levels that balance sensitivity and signal linearity
cp105Topics: 6.3 Effect of AC field strength on eddy current testing
